---
#title: "Background, data, material, methods, and references"
format: html
author: 
  - name: "SVA name "
    affiliations: "Swedish Veterinary Agency"
  - name: "FOHM name"
    affiliation: "Public Health Agency of Sweden"
---

# Background, data, material and methods {#sec-backdatamm}

{{< include Demographics_and_denominator_data.qmd >}}

{{< include Material_and_methods_sales_of_antibiotics.qmd >}}

{{< include MM_resistance_in_bacteria_from_animals.qmd >}}

{{< include Svarm_2000_2024.qmd >}}
